title: eryngium weberbaueri
intro: Eryngium weberbaueri, a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, is native to Peru and is also known as Weberbauer's eryngium. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Eryngium weberbaueri include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues and infections. The plant can be prepared as an infusion or tincture, and its herbal preparations are typically used to treat various ailments, including bronchitis and coughs.
